page.title: Template:Country data Korea under Japanese rule

revision.comment: Bot: redirect unused template to en:
revision.text: #redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]]" to "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]"
revision.text: #redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude>"
revision.text: #redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23359502324|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{ {{{1<noinclude>|country showdata</noinclude>}}} | alias = Korea under Japanese rule | shortname alias = Japanese Korea | flag alias = Flag of Japan (1870–1999).svg | flag alias-1905 = Flag of the Japanese Resident General of Korea (1905).svg | flag alias-naval = Naval ensign of the Empire of Japan.svg | link alias-naval = Imperial Japanese Navy | flag alias-army = War flag of the Imperial Japanese Army.svg | link alias-army = Imperial Japanese Army | flag alias-air force = War flag of the Imperial Japanese Army.svg | link alias-air force = Imperial Japanese Army Air Service | flag alias-navy = Naval ensign of the Empire of Japan.svg | link alias-navy = Imperial Japanese Navy | size = {{{size|}}} | name = {{{name|}}} | altlink = {{{altlink|}}} | altvar = {{{altvar|}}} | variant= {{{variant|}}} <noinclude> | var1 = 1905 | related1 = Empire of Japan </noinclude> }} <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Country_data_Korea_under_Japanese_rule here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: <!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Country_data_Korea_under_Japanese_rule for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{ {{{1<noinclude>|country showdata</noinclude>}}} | alias = Korea under Japanese rule | shortname alias = Japanese Korea | flag alias = Flag of Japan (1870–1999).svg | flag alias-1905 = Flag of the Japanese Resident General of Korea (1905).svg | flag alias-naval = Naval ensign of the Empire of Japan.svg | link alias-naval = Imperial Japanese Navy | flag alias-army = War flag of the Imperial Japanese Army.svg | link alias-army = Imperial Japanese Army | flag alias-air force = War flag of the Imperial Japanese Army.svg | link alias-air force = Imperial Japanese Army Air Service | flag alias-navy = Naval ensign of the Empire of Japan.svg | link alias-navy = Imperial Japanese Navy | size = {{{size|}}} | name = {{{name|}}} | altlink = {{{altlink|}}} | altvar = {{{altvar|}}} | variant= {{{variant|}}} <noinclude> | var1 = 1905 | related1 = Empire of Japan </noinclude> }} <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
